subcodes.first_line: O Physician! God willing, mayest thou ever remain confirmed and assisted. Be thou not disheartened, for thy non-attendance was not due to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طبیبی انشاء الله لازال موفق و موید باشید دلتنگ نباشید سبب عدم احضار شما عدم
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
